response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and experience with complex systems, but lacks the core technical requirements for this role. The position explicitly requires deep Java and Kotlin expertise with Spring ecosystem experience and IDE/language tooling knowledge. The resume shows minimal Java experience, zero Spring/enterprise framework background, and no IDE internals expertise. The candidate's recent focus on Node.js/TypeScript and AI infrastructure diverges significantly from enterprise Java development needs.
strengths: Proven track record shipping complex systems at scale (millions of requests/sec, microservices infrastructure)
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development practices)
Active in open source and community contribution with multiple technical talks and projects
concerns: Minimal Java and Kotlin experience with no demonstrated depth in JVM ecosystem fundamentals
No experience with Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or other enterprise frameworks required for the role
No background in IDE development, IDE internals, language servers, or language tooling (core to the position)

key_factors.factor: Strong software craftsmanship and complex systems experience
